playbook.intent: Establish the minimum communication rhythm for a 2–3 person agency where the founder is also the PM. Replaces standups, retros, and 1:1s with one weekly sync + structured async + a Friday close-the-books ritual. Outcome: founder spends <4h/week on internal comms.
playbook.scope: Establish the minimum communication rhythm for a 2–3 person agency where the founder is also the PM. Replaces standups, retros, and 1:1s with one weekly sync + structured async + a Friday close-the-books ritual. Outcome: founder spends <4h/week on internal comms.

success-criteria.criterion: All 3 stages have written outputs in the project record
Each stage's decision gate was answered before advancing (yes / no in writing)
Final stage produced the required written decision artifact
Every methodology reference loaded cleanly via `faion get-content`

stage.name: Set the Operating Cadence
stage.intent: No full-time PM, so cadence does the PM's job.

tasks.task: Pick 1 sync per week + daily async standup
Pick 1 shared decision log + 1 backlog source-of-truth
Write the cadence one-pager and pin it

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when every team member has acknowledged the one-pager.

stage.name: Run It for 2 Weeks
stage.intent: Make the cadence real before tuning it.

tasks.task: Hold the sync; respect the time-box (≤45 minutes)
Use the async standup template daily
Log every decision and every blocker, no exceptions

stage.decision-gate: Advance when the cadence has held for 2 consecutive weeks.

stage.name: Diagnose & Tune
stage.intent: Cut anything that's not pulling weight.

tasks.task: Ask each team member what they would drop, change, or add
Cut one meeting or one document if usage is low
Lock the tuned cadence as the new baseline

stage.decision-gate: Required output: a written tuned cadence the team has agreed to.
